text:
Place of Residence 

The current statutory definition of homebound or confined does not imply that Medicare 
coverage has been expanded to include adult day care services. 

The law does not permit an HHA to furnish a Medicare covered billable visit to a patient 
under a home health plan of care outside his or her home, except in those limited 
circumstances where the patient needs to use medical equipment that is too cumbersome 
to bring to the home. Section 1861(m) of the Act stipulates that
